mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.realname, u.img, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.post, u.mobile, u.email, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.employee_status, ''), CASE WHEN u.status = 1 THEN 'active' WHEN u.status = 2 THEN 'resigned' ELSE 'disabled' END) AS employee_status, u.parent_id, p.realname AS parent_name, ( SELECT MAX(COALESCE(t.completed_time, t.due_date, t.update_time, t.create_time)) FROM crm_task t WHERE t.assigned_to = u.user_id ) AS recent_task_time FROM manager_user u LEFT JOIN manager_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN manager_user p ON u.parent_id = p.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
